zh.of Warrington, Lancaster, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓
zh.Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham於大約1470年出生在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德時，他的父親Geffrey Massey26歲，母親Isabel Boteler20歲。他於1501年與Alice Whitney在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德。

zh-hans.of Warrington, Lancaster, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham于大约1470年出生在英国英格兰爾可努恰福德时，他的父亲Geffrey Massey26岁，母亲Isabel Boteler20岁。他于1501年与Alice Whitney在英国英格兰爾可努恰福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰爾可努恰福德。

nameMeanings.name: Massey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).
English: variant of Marsay (see Marcey ).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massie
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeen): variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Marsee
meanings: English: altered form of   Massey  .

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Germain.
Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .
Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Masey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Macy
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamonn
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamon
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éaman
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham was born about 1470, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geffrey Massey, was 26 and his mother, Isabel Boteler, was 20. He married Alice Whitney in 1501, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in his hometown, and was buried in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham est né environ 1470, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geffrey Massey, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Boteler, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Whitney en 1501, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham um 1470 in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geffrey Massey 26 und seine Mutter Isabel Boteler 20. Er hat 1501 in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Whitney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham è nato il circa 1470 nel Knutsford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geffrey Massey, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Boteler, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice Whitney nel 1501, nel Knutsford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Knutsford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Hamon Massey of Dunhamが約1470年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードで生まれた時，父Geffrey Masseyは26歳，母Isabel Botelerは20歳であった。1501年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードでAlice Whitneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham(이)가 대략 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geffrey Massey(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Boteler(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 Alice Whitney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geffrey Massey, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Boteler, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Whitney em 1501, em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham родился около 1470 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geffrey Massey было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Boteler, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Whitney в 1501 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham nació aproximadamente 1470, en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geffrey Massey, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Boteler, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alice Whitney en 1501, en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
